heading: Implementation of a sentence of probation
label: 3566 Implementation of a sentence of probation
text: The implementation of a sentence of probation is governed by the provisions of subchapter A of chapter 229.
notes: Prior ProvisionsFor prior sections 3566 to 3570, applicable to offenses committed prior to , see note set out preceding .Nov. 1, 1987section 3551 of this title

Effective DateSection effective , and applicable only to offenses committed after the taking effect of this section, see , set out as a note under .Nov. 1, 1987section 235(a)(1) of Pub. L. 98–473section 3551 of this title
